queries.question: What are the first 10 product names in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name FROM products ORDER BY product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 customer company names in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name FROM customers ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 supplier company names in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name FROM suppliers ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 category names in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT category_name FROM categories ORDER BY category_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 shipper company names in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name FROM shippers ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 employee names in alphabetical order by last name?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM employees ORDER BY last_name, first_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 order IDs in ascending order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT order_id FROM orders ORDER BY order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 territory descriptions in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT territory_description FROM territories ORDER BY territory_description LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 region descriptions in alphabetical order?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT region_description FROM region ORDER BY region_description LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the first 10 distinct ship countries from orders?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT ship_country FROM orders ORDER BY ship_country LIMIT 10;

queries.question: How many products are in each category?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT category_id, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY product_count DESC, category_id;

queries.question: What is the average unit price by category?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT category_id, ROUND(AVG(unit_price)::numeric, 2) AS avg_unit_price FROM products GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY avg_unit_price DESC, category_id;

queries.question: What is the total units in stock by supplier?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT supplier_id, SUM(units_in_stock) AS total_units_in_stock FROM products GROUP BY supplier_id ORDER BY total_units_in_stock DESC, supplier_id;

queries.question: How many orders are there per ship country?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT ship_country, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY ship_country ORDER BY order_count DESC, ship_country;

queries.question: What is the average freight by shipping method?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT ship_via, ROUND(AVG(freight)::numeric, 2) AS avg_freight FROM orders GROUP BY ship_via ORDER BY avg_freight DESC, ship_via;

queries.question: How many employees are there per country?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employees GROUP BY country ORDER BY employee_count DESC, country;

queries.question: How many customers are there per country?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY country ORDER BY customer_count DESC, country;

queries.question: What is the total units on order by category?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT category_id, SUM(units_on_order) AS total_units_on_order FROM products GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY total_units_on_order DESC, category_id;

queries.question: How many products are discontinued versus active?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT discontinued, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY discontinued ORDER BY discontinued;

queries.question: What is the average units in stock by discontinued status?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT discontinued, ROUND(AVG(units_in_stock)::numeric, 2) AS avg_units_in_stock FROM products GROUP BY discontinued ORDER BY discontinued;

queries.question: List product names together with their category names.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT p.product_name, c.category_name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id ORDER BY p.product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List product names together with their supplier company names.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT p.product_name, s.company_name AS supplier_name FROM products p JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id ORDER BY p.product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List customer company names together with their order counts.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT c.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List employee names together with their order counts.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM employees e JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id GROUP BY employee_name ORDER BY order_count DESC, employee_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List shipper company names together with their shipment counts.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT s.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS shipment_count FROM shippers s JOIN orders o ON s.shipper_id = o.ship_via GROUP BY s.company_name ORDER BY shipment_count DESC, s.company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List product names together with sold quantity across all order details.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(od.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold FROM order_details od JOIN products p ON od.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC, p.product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List customer company names together with their latest order date.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT c.company_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS latest_order_date FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY latest_order_date DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List order IDs together with customer company names for the first 10 orders.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT o.order_id, c.company_name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id ORDER BY o.order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List order IDs together with employee names for the first 10 orders.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT o.order_id, e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.employee_id = e.employee_id ORDER BY o.order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List order IDs together with shipper company names for the first 10 orders.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT o.order_id, s.company_name AS shipper_name FROM orders o JOIN shippers s ON o.ship_via = s.shipper_id ORDER BY o.order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List category names together with product counts.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY product_count DESC, c.category_name;

queries.question: List supplier company names together with average product unit price.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT s.company_name, ROUND(AVG(p.unit_price)::numeric, 2) AS avg_unit_price FROM suppliers s JOIN products p ON s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id GROUP BY s.company_name ORDER BY avg_unit_price DESC, s.company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List product names together with revenue generated from order details.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS revenue FROM order_details od JOIN products p ON od.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY revenue DESC, p.product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List order IDs together with the number of line items in each order.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT o.order_id, COUNT(od.product_id) AS line_item_count FROM orders o JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id ORDER BY line_item_count DESC, o.order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List customer company names together with the number of distinct ship countries in their orders.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT c.company_name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.ship_country) AS ship_country_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.company_name ORDER BY ship_country_count DESC, c.company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What is the total revenue per order for the top 10 orders?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT o.order_id, c.company_name, ROUND(SUM(od.unit_price * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount))::numeric, 2) AS order_revenue FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id, c.company_name ORDER BY order_revenue DESC, o.order_id LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List product names with their category names and supplier names.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT p.product_name, c.category_name, s.company_name AS supplier_name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id ORDER BY p.product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: List employee names with the territories they cover.
queries.expected_sql: SELECT e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS employee_name, t.territory_description FROM employees e JOIN employee_territories et ON e.employee_id = et.employee_id JOIN territories t ON et.territory_id = t.territory_id ORDER BY employee_name, territory_description LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which products are priced above the overall average product price?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products WHERE unit_price > (SELECT AVG(unit_price) FROM products) ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which customers have placed more than five orders?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: What are the top 5 most expensive products?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 5;

queries.question: What are the top 5 products with the highest stock?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name, units_in_stock FROM products ORDER BY units_in_stock DESC LIMIT 5;

queries.question: Which customers are located in the USA?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name, city, country FROM customers WHERE country = 'USA' ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which orders were placed in 1997 with the highest freight values?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT order_id, order_date, freight FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND order_date < DATE '1998-01-01' ORDER BY freight DESC LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which employees were hired after 1993?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT first_name, last_name, hire_date FROM employees WHERE hire_date > DATE '1993-12-31' ORDER BY hire_date LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which suppliers are based in the USA?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name, city FROM suppliers WHERE country = 'USA' ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which products have stock below their reorder level?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name, units_in_stock, reorder_level FROM products WHERE units_in_stock < reorder_level ORDER BY (reorder_level - units_in_stock) DESC, product_name LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which orders have freight above 100?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT order_id, freight FROM orders WHERE freight > 100 ORDER BY freight DESC LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which active products are priced above 50?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products WHERE discontinued = 0 AND unit_price > 50 ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 10;

queries.question: Which customers are located in Germany?
queries.expected_sql: SELECT company_name, city FROM customers WHERE country = 'Germany' ORDER BY company_name LIMIT 10;
